'''竏嗟-ng-l-t''' ('''kalangletoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hairdress|hairdress]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ng-l-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hairdress|hairdress]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗟-ng-l-t
|-
! Lemma
| kalangletoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilangletoko|thilangletoko]] || [[word:jilangletoko|jilangletoko]] || [[word:shilangletoko|shilangletoko]] || [[word:kilangletoko|kilangletoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulangletoko|thuthulangletoko]] || [[word:jujulangletoko|jujulangletoko]] || [[word:shushulangletoko|shushulangletoko]] || [[word:kukulangletoko|kukulangletoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulangletoko|thulangletoko]] || [[word:julangletoko|julangletoko]] || [[word:shulangletoko|shulangletoko]] || [[word:kulangletoko|kulangletoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulangletoko|thulangletoko]] || [[word:julangletoko|julangletoko]] || [[word:shulangletoko|shulangletoko]] || [[word:kulangletoko|kulangletoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelangletoko|thelangletoko]] || [[word:jelangletoko|jelangletoko]] || [[word:shelangletoko|shelangletoko]] || [[word:kelangletoko|kelangletoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholangletoko|thotholangletoko]] || [[word:jojolangletoko|jojolangletoko]] || [[word:shosholangletoko|shosholangletoko]] || [[word:kokolangletoko|kokolangletoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholangletoko|tholangletoko]] || [[word:jolangletoko|jolangletoko]] || [[word:sholangletoko|sholangletoko]] || [[word:kolangletoko|kolangletoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholangletoko|tholangletoko]] || [[word:jolangletoko|jolangletoko]] || [[word:sholangletoko|sholangletoko]] || [[word:kolangletoko|kolangletoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦlangletoko|thﾃｦlangletoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦlangletoko|jﾃｦlangletoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦlangletoko|shﾃｦlangletoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦlangletoko|kﾃｦlangletoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalangletoko|thathalangletoko]] || [[word:jajalangletoko|jajalangletoko]] || [[word:shashalangletoko|shashalangletoko]] || [[word:kakalangletoko|kakalangletoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalangletoko|thalangletoko]] || [[word:jalangletoko|jalangletoko]] || [[word:shalangletoko|shalangletoko]] || [[word:kalangletoko|kalangletoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalangletoko|thalangletoko]] || [[word:jalangletoko|jalangletoko]] || [[word:shalangletoko|shalangletoko]] || [[word:kalangletoko|kalangletoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
